notes: Stabilizes cabin setup: Edge=wa-1, Chrome=wa-2, Firefox=wa-3 are found as browser WhatsApp Web windows first; missing channels open web.whatsapp.com in the assigned browser only, not the installed WhatsApp/PWA.
